arts.ttl: Sources: West Ham were just offered chance to sign £11.6m striker compared to Jamie Vardy but never responded
Fulham consider signing Coventry City player this month – Everton have also been keen
arts.sum: There’s a claim in the Dutch media that Fulham are the latest club to show interest in Coventry City defender Milan van Ewijk. The Dutchman has impressed for the Championship side and subsequently been linked with other clubs, and is of interest to Fulham and Everton. arts.ttl: Brighton and Fulham pair being lined up by Ajax transfer planners
arts.sum: Brighton and Hove Albion’s Joel Veltman is on Ajax’s list of options for this month, alongside Fulham’s Kenny Tete. That’s according to De Telegraaf, who report the pair are on the list at the Dutch club as they consider replacements for Devyne Rensch. The newspaper state that Ajax are preparing for Rensch’s departure this month. The post Brighton and Fulham pair being lined up by Ajax transfer planners appeared first on Sport Witness.
